summary: Iteration 42 testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: (1) Achats sub-tabs 'En cours' and 'Achats validés' with counters, (2) Admin revision card with 'Approuver' and 'Nouvelle révision' buttons, (3) Revise modal with 3 buttons (Annuler, Renvoyer à la gérante, Approuver directement), (4) Compte courant tab with 'Prélèvement auto du jour' button and auto-deduct toggle in account modal, (5) Decimal quantity support (step='any') in expense revise modal and needs form.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 tested new features: (1) Decimal support for expenses/needs quantities - backend accepts float values like 0.5, frontend inputs have step='any'. (2) Current accounts auto_deduct_enabled field and run-auto-deduction endpoint with idempotency. (3) Achats sub-tabs 'En cours' (data-testid='achats-subtab-en-cours') and 'Achats validés' (data-testid='achats-subtab-valides'). (4) Admin revision card (data-testid='admin-revision-card') with approve/revise buttons. (5) Revise modal has 3 buttons: Annuler, 'Renvoyer à la gérante' (data-testid='submit-revision-btn'), 'Approuver directement' (data-testid='submit-revise-approve-btn'). (6) Compte courant tab has 'Prélèvement auto du jour' button (data-testid='run-auto-deduction-btn') and auto-deduct toggle (data-testid='auto-deduct-toggle') in account modal.

tests: POST /api/expenses with items[] containing float quantities
PUT /api/expenses/{id} accepts quantity float in items list
POST /api/needs accepts quantity=0.5 at need level
Admin revision card visible for revision_requested expenses
Revise modal opens when clicking 'Nouvelle révision'
Quantity inputs have step='any' for decimal support
Account modal has add schedule button (data-testid='add-schedule-btn')
New need form has quantity input with step='any'
